response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified songs 'Our Time Yellow' and 'Genesis' from on-screen text. 2. Identified ReGLOSS as the performers. 3. response.global_summary: A two-song performance by hololive generation ReGLOSS, consisting of 'Our Time Yellow' followed by 'Genesis'.

scenes.description: ReGLOSS performs 'Our Time Yellow'. Text 'アワータイムイエロー' appears in the top-left.
scenes.song_title: Our Time Yellow (アワータイムイエロー)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ソラヲボエで挑む 人生ゲーム
言い訳めいたハートに従って
現実は半即興なプロットです
取り憑かれるオーバーな芝居
世渡り上手なあの子はね (Hey)
二度と被った猫 外せない
痛みを知ってしまった Magician
手の内...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Game of life, challenging with memorized sky
Following a heart that sounds like an excuse
Reality is a semi-improvised plot
An over-the-top act I'm possessed by
That girl who's good at getting along (Hey)
Once you put on the cat, you can't take it off
Magician who learned the pain
My hand...

scenes.description: ReGLOSS performs 'Genesis'. Text 'Genesis' appears in the center.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Time to open up your eyes
Feel the music start to rise
Got to break the world and let me in
I know I was meant to be
Livin' life so fast and free
Try to keep your eyes on me
This is our genesis! How do you like this plot twist?
I'm embracing my madness (can you hear it?)
Whispers banging down your window (oh, yeah, oh, yeah)
Rumors reaching a crescendo (ah-ha-ha)
No humble beginnings, I'm destined for great things
I'm sure you've heard of me by now, woah-oh
